question:
Dumpuses are cold. Dumpuses are rompuses. Each rompus is red. Rompuses are numpuses. Numpuses are dull. Each numpus is a yumpus. Yumpuses are happy. Every yumpus is a tumpus. Every tumpus is not kind. Every tumpus is a zumpus. Zumpuses are large. Every zumpus is a vumpus. Vumpuses are earthy. Every vumpus is an impus. Jompuses are not earthy. Impuses are not liquid. Impuses are wumpuses. Sam is a numpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Sam is not earthy.
error: Failed after 3 attempts. Last error: Undefined name in expression 'ForAll([x], Implies(dumpus(x), cold(x)))': name 'x' is not defined
